content: Hey, I'm River Taylor, nice to meet you. I've been trying to balance my work and personal life lately. As a blockchain developer at a DeFi protocol, my days can get pretty hectic.
Nice to meet you too, River! It sounds like you have a lot on your plate. What's a typical day like for you?
Well, I wake up at 6:00 AM, go for a 5-mile run along the Willamette River, and then head back home to get ready for work. I love marathon running, it helps me clear my head.
That sounds like a great way to start the day! Do you have any other hobbies or interests that help you unwind?
Actually, I've recently gotten into leatherworking and home automation. I find it really relaxing to work with my hands and create something from scratch.
That's really cool! I've never met anyone who's into leatherworking before. Do you have a favorite project that you've worked on?
Yeah, I made a custom wallet for my dad's birthday last year. He loved it! By the way, I'm taking care of my aging parents right now, so it's been a bit of an adjustment.
That's really sweet of you, River. It's great that you're able to take care of your parents. How do you balance your work and family responsibilities?

It's not always easy, but I try to prioritize my tasks and make sure I have enough time for everything. I work from home a few days a week, which helps. I live in Portland, OR, and I love the city, but sometimes I wish I had more time to explore.
I can imagine it can be challenging. Do you have any favorite spots in Portland that you like to visit when you do have some free time?
Yeah, I love going to the Japanese Garden. It's so peaceful and beautiful. And, of course, I love DJing at local events. It's a great way to express myself and have fun.
The Japanese Garden is definitely a must-see in Portland. And that's really cool that you're into DJing! What kind of music do you like to play?
I'm really into electronic dance music right now. I've been listening to a lot of techno and trance. I might even start a podcast about it soon.
That sounds like a great idea! I'm sure you'd have a lot of fun sharing your passion with others. What do you think you'd name your podcast?
I'm not sure yet, but I'm thinking maybe something like 'The Beat of Portland'. I want it to reflect my love for the city and music.
I like it! 'The Beat of Portland' is catchy and easy to remember. I'm sure it'll be a hit. Do you have any upcoming events or gigs that you're excited about?
Actually, I'm playing at a festival on June 15th. It's going to be a lot of fun! I'm really looking forward to it.
That sounds like an amazing opportunity! I'm sure you'll do great. Is there anything else you're looking forward to in the coming months?
Yeah, my parents' anniversary is coming up on August 20th, and I want to make sure I get them something special. Maybe I'll even make them a custom leather photo album.
That's a wonderful idea, River! I'm sure they'll appreciate the thought and love that goes into it. It was great chatting with you, River. I hope you have a great day!
You too, thanks for listening! It's been really helpful to talk through my daily routine and goals.
Anytime, River. Remember to take care of yourself and prioritize your well-being, especially with everything you have going on. Have a great day and good luck with your festival performance!
